force_description: Officer reaches into vehicle; driver accelerates, dragging officer.

key_moments.description: Officer approaches vehicle and repeatedly orders driver to get out.
Officer reaches into the vehicle cabin while continuing to order the driver out.
Driver accelerates the vehicle while the officer is partially inside.
Officer is dragged by the moving vehicle, yelling for the driver to stop.
Officer separates from the fleeing vehicle and falls to the ground.
Officer radios dispatch, reporting the vehicle fled with him on it and stating he is okay.

summary: An officer approaches a parked vehicle and orders the driver to exit. The driver refuses, and as the officer reaches into the vehicle, the driver accelerates. The officer is dragged a short distance before falling to the ground as the vehicle flees the scene.
